selection_policy: Popularity is a practical audit priority, not a formal market-share claim. Default sets prioritize major frontier labs, enterprise/cloud-hosted surfaces, high-usage routers, and widely used inference platforms that already exist as provider IDs in this repository.

sources.name: a16z CIO Survey
sources.relevance: Enterprise production adoption and wallet-share signals for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.

sources.name: OpenRouter rankings
sources.relevance: Public rankings based on benchmarks and real usage data from users accessing models through OpenRouter.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis provider leaderboard
sources.relevance: Public comparison of API provider performance across hundreds of model endpoints.

sources.name: OpenRouter models API documentation
sources.relevance: Public model API coverage for many providers and model authors.

popular_core.description: Highest-priority audit queue: dominant direct labs plus enterprise/cloud and routing surfaces in this repo.

popular_extended.description: Broader popular-provider queue for direct labs, routers, and inference platforms commonly used by developers.

direct_model_labs.description: Model authors with first-party or clearly branded model APIs/docs.

cloud_surfaces.description: Cloud-hosted provider surfaces whose metadata often differs from first-party model docs.

inference_platforms.description: Routers and inference platforms with public model catalogs or endpoint metadata.
